filters.heading: File filters
filters.summary: Filestore files larger than {sizeMB} MB will not be included in the export. All types of filestore files will be included.
filters.summaryWithExclusions: Filestore files larger than {sizeMB} MB will not be included in the export. All types of filestore files will be included, apart from the following: {extensions}.

columns.path: Full path on the File System

foundLinks.heading: Filestore links found in exported content
foundLinks.summary: Exported content contains {filesCount} filestore link from {fileSystemsCount} File System.

login.allLoggedIn: You are logged into all File Systems referenced by filestore links.
login.authProblem: Authentication problem, check your username and password or contact your System Admin
login.heading: File Systems that require login
login.notAllLoggedIn: You are not logged into all File Systems referenced by filestore links. Please login to remaining File Systems or some linked files may be omitted during the export.

noLinks.checkSelection: If that's unexpected, you should check your export selection.
noLinks.heading: No filestore links found in exported content.
noLinks.proceed: Otherwise you can proceed with the export.

scan.checkResults: Please check the scan results for details.

columns.path: Full path on the File System

scan.filesIncluded: Export will include {count} filestore file(s) of total size {size}.
scan.filesSkipped: {count} file(s) or folder(s) will be skipped.
scan.heading: Link availability scan
scan.noFilesIncluded: Export will not include any filestore files.
scan.runHint: Before continuing please run the filestore links availability scan, which will report on any unaccessible or filtered links.

validation.exceedsDiskSpace: The size of filestore files to be included in export ({size}) exceeds disk space currently available on RSpace server. Use file filters to exclude some files, or contact your System Admin.
validation.exceedsGlobalLimit: The size of filestore files to be included in export ({size}) exceeds the global limit set for size of RSpace archive file. Use file filters to exclude some files, or ask your System Admin to raise the limit on archive size.
validation.loggedOut: You are not logged into all required File Systems and some filestore links won't be exported. Do you want to proceed without logging in?
validation.scanNotPerformed: You have not performed links availability scan. We strongly recommend running it, as it will report any potential problems with accessing filestore link. Do you want to proceed without running the scan?

formats.docAvailable: MS Word version of your RSpace documents will be placed in the 'Exports' area of the Gallery.
formats.elnExplanation: An XML bundle with an RO-Crate metadata file, zipped into a .eln archive.
formats.htmlExplanation: Exported data, notebooks and attached files can be accessed offline with a browser.
formats.pdfAvailable: A read-only version of your RSpace documents will be placed in the 'Exports' area of the Gallery
formats.pdfUnavailable: All selected items are attachments — there are no RSpace documents to export.
formats.xmlExplanation: Exported data is machine readable. Good for archiving, or transferring data from one RSpace server or user to another.

chooser.heading: Choose an appropriate format for your export
chooser.includeAllVersions: Check to include all previous versions of your documents, or leave unchecked for only current version
chooser.noRepoSetup: You have not setup a repository, to do so please activate them within Apps
chooser.repoFetchError: Export to repository is not available because there was an error fetching repository configurations.

wordErrors.allMedia: All selected items are attachments — there are no RSpace documents to export.
wordErrors.folder: Word export is only available for a single document, and you've selected a folder.
wordErrors.multiple: Word export is only available for a single document, and you have selected more than one.
wordErrors.notebook: Word export is only available for a single document or notebook entry, and you've selected a Notebook.

htmlXml.depthInfinity: Include linked documents to depth infinity
htmlXml.foldersNote: Linked folders and notebooks are never included
htmlXml.includeLinksLabel: Should linked RSpace documents be included in export?

checkboxes.footerEndOnly: Insert date footer at file end only
checkboxes.lastModified: Include last modified dates for fields
checkboxes.restartPageNumbers: Restart page numbering for each document

eligible.instructions: By enabling reporting to RAID below, the DOI of your repository export will be automatically added to your RAiD record. Otherwise, click Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
eligible.projectGroupLine: The content you're about to export is part of the project group {name} which is associated with the following RAiD identifier:
eligible.title: Report to RAiD

error.message: An error occurred while determining RAiD export eligibility: {message}
error.nextHint: Please press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
error.title: Error

ineligible.missingGroups: You do not have access to the following groups, therefore RSpace is unable to determine whether you have the rights to export the items to RAiD: {groupIds}. For more information, please contact the owner of the item, or press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
ineligible.multipleRaids: Multiple project groups ({groups}) associated with the shared items have RAiD associations, which is not supported. Please narrow your selection, or press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
ineligible.noProjectGroups: No project groups are associated with all shared items selected. Please press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
ineligible.noRaidAssociation: None of the project groups ({groups}) associated with the shared items have a RAiD association. Please press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
ineligible.title: Cannot report to RAiD
ineligible.unknown: An unknown error occurred while determining RAiD export eligibility. Please press Next to continue without reporting to RAiD.
